name: iron-jarvis-desktop
description: Native desktop wrapper for Iron Jarvis. Boots the local Python daemon (uv run ironjarvis serve) and the Next.js dashboard (pnpm start), then opens them in a native window.
author: RealDealCPA

build.//note: DEV WRAPPER: this packaged app still expects the Iron Jarvis repo (the Python daemon + the ./dashboard) to live one directory ABOVE the app (path.join(__dirname,'..')). It launches `uv run ironjarvis serve` and `pnpm start` from there. A fully self-contained installer that bundles Python + a prebuilt dashboard is a future step (see README).
